details.effect: [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage, draw a card, and, if there are at least 3 Hunter cards in your cemetery, you may summon a Hunter follower that costs 3 or less from your hand.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Banquet of Dreams & Trial of the Omens"
details.effect: Bane. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [lastwords] Summon a Flame General's Regalia token.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Banquet of Dreams & Trial of the Omens"
details.effect: [fanfare] The next Festive card that costs 3 or less or Mage card that costs 3 or less you play this turn costs 3 less. Whenever you play a Festive card that costs 3 or less or a Mage card that costs 3 or less, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Banquet of Dreams & Trial of the Omens"
details.effect: On Evolve - The next Festive card you play this turn costs 2 less.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Banquet of Dreams & Trial of the Omens"
details.effect: [act] [cost01], banish this from your cemetery: Select up to 3 cards in your cemetery and/or banished zone named Paracelise, Demon of Greed and shuffle them into your deck. You may turn any faceup cards in your evolve deck named Paracelise, Demon of Greed facedown. ---------- Do the following 2 times. "Put the top card of your deck into your EX area. Banish a card from your hand."

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Banquet of Dreams & Trial of the Omens"
details.effect: Ward. This can't be destroyed by abilities. If this or your leader would take damage, they take that much minus 1 instead. [fanfare] Put a Mercurial Might token into your EX area.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Banquet of Dreams & Trial of the Omens"
details.effect: [fanfare] Banish a Fiend or Archfiend card from your cemetery: Select up to 2 enemy cards on the field and destroy them. [act] Banish a Fiend or Archfiend card from your cemetery: Give this Storm.
